_comment: multi-cc-im hooks template — replace ABS_PATH with the absolute path to your multi-cc-im checkout. After editing, merge the `hooks` block into ~/.claude/settings.json (cc reads from there). Schema follows cc upstream: `hooks` is an object keyed by event name, each event maps to an array of matcher groups (with their own inner `hooks` array of handlers). https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks. The 6 events are needed: SessionStart sets up paneToSession map; SessionEnd / PID checks drive PaneAlive; UserPromptSubmit / Stop carry events into bridge router; PreToolUse / PostToolUse populate events.jsonl for future analytics. Easier path: run `./bin/multi-cc-im setup-hooks` instead of editing this by hand. See README.md Quick Start step 4 for context.
